'''[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] spinning blades''' were carried by the Twi'lek assassins known as the [[Twin Suns (assassins)|Twin Suns]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] when it was visited by the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] in [[3951 BBY]].

*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
